Victory Square staging and short logistics dialogue; the convoy beat and route are kept verbatim, the approach choreography bridged.
Preliminary mike-safety chatter and self-deprecation dialogue; the embrace and naming kept.
Chocolate/black-market exchange and disguise small-talk; flavor restated by retained beats.
Meeting-logistics texture; subsumed by retained practical-cunning paragraph.
Julia's biography (Pornosec, schooling) and Katharine setup; strongest political insight retained, biography compressed.

Versificator song verses and off-meeting logistics; the prole-woman image and singing kept once.
Tool-bag reveal staging; compressed to a bridge before the luxuries list.
Bed/bug/make-up small-talk and clock logistics; restated by retained beats.
Hate Week preparation montage (posters, bombs, Parsons); world-texture padding after the war-fever is established.
Jones/Aaronson/Rutherford recap dialogue; the falsified-past argument kept verbatim, the recap bridged out.
Restatement of Julia's incuriosity about doctrine; already shown.
Newspeak-Dictionary pretext dialogue with O'Brien; the signal and its meaning kept, the cover-conversation bridged.
Frame and hunger-childhood texture; bridged to preserve the chocolate-theft turn.
Connective dream-recall and confession dialogue; the 'they can't get inside you' core retained.
Arrival staging, Newspeak speakwrite jargon, and approach dialogue; intimidation and the declaration kept.
Martin/wine staging and middle catechism rungs; representative rungs and the wine toast retained.
Surgeon/Martin texture, brief-case handover mechanics, and rhyme repetition; the Brotherhood speech, book promise, and 'no darkness' exchange kept.
Hate Week / records-rectification padding and atrocity catalogue compressed to bridges; iconic mid-sentence switch retained.
War-is-Peace reiterations (labour-power detail, weapons catalogue, atomic stalemate, military-necessity restatement) compressed; first full statement of each idea kept verbatim.
Duplicate re-reading: Orwell repeats the chapter headings and the High/Middle/Low and 'aims' paragraphs verbatim when Winston reads aloud to Julia; kept a single canonical instance.

Ignorance-is-Strength historical exposition and doublethink elaboration compressed; crimestop/blackwhite, doublethink definition, mutability of the past, four-ways-to-fall and the Ministries reversal retained.

Over-retention contraction (~1,461 → target band). Dropped the long prole-woman reverie prose (¶19), the candle/chopper telescreen taunt (¶37), Julia being struck and carried out plus the coral-fragment beat (¶40), and the clock interiority (¶41). The proles' vitality reflection is now carried by a bridge plus the verbatim 'you were the dead; theirs was the future' passage. Retained verbatim: 'She's beautiful'; 'We are the dead' (Winston and Julia) and the iron voice 'You are the dead'; the boots-on-the-stairs raid; the glass paperweight smashed on the hearth-stone; Mr Charrington's entrance and his Thought-Police transformation.
Drunk-woman vignette and connective cell-procedure beats compressed; Ampleforth, Parsons, the skull-faced starvation climax, Room 101 dread and O'Brien's entrance retained.
Interrogation/beating montage and dream-corridor imagery; representative beats kept verbatim (¶3), rest compressed to a bridge to avoid repetition.
Extended metaphysical sparring and the repeated 'how many fingers' exchange; the iconic dial/2+2 logic is anchored at ¶51/¶53/¶75/¶76, remaining call-and-response cut as repetition.
Martyrdom digression and Q&A on Big Brother's existence compressed; thesis lines (¶100,¶104,¶106) and Room 101 turn retained.
Solipsism/astronomy debate; rhetorically repetitive. Power thesis (¶14,¶18) kept; metaphysical volley reduced to bridge.
Mirror-scene build-up and degradation catalogue compressed; the visual climax (¶66,¶71) and 'not betrayed Julia' beat retained.
Recovery routine, crimestop drills, and shooting-from-behind musing; capitulation slogans and Julia outburst retained, padding cut.
Cage staging and rat lore; the worst-thing thesis, lever speech, and 'Do it to Julia' climax retained, intermediate description compressed.
War-bulletin brooding, chess-problem mysticism, Snakes-and-Ladders memory; thinned to bridges so the café frame, Julia reunion, and ending land cleanly.

Granular grammar mechanics and worked examples (inflections, compound formation, Declaration of Independence text); principles kept verbatim, illustrative detail compressed per DEEP-appendix guidance.
